title: HypothesisRecord
description: A typed hypothesis record produced by a Proposer agent. Stored in research-private/plans/{date}-{crack-id}/hypothesis-tree/.

crack_id.description: The crack or opening this hypothesis addresses.

proposer_id.description: Agent ID that generated this hypothesis, e.g. 'proposer-claude'.

parent_hypothesis_id.description: If this is a mutation, the parent hypothesis. Mutations never overwrite parents.

required_measurements.description: Measurements needed to test this hypothesis.

predicted_convergence_delta.description: Expected shift in convergence map if experiments succeed.

depends.description: Operational depends chain for this hypothesis.

elo_rating.description: Current Elo rating from tournament matches.

tournament_matches.description: Number of tournament matches this hypothesis has participated in.
